title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
